arrangement_tips: Piano or guitar. Include Newton verses and Tomlin bridge chorus. Full band builds well. All ages participate.

title: At the Cross (Love Ran Red)
summary_theology: At the cross where love ran red in the blood of Christ, the believer finds the only place of surrender, cleansing, and peace with God.
practical_worship_leadership: Deep communion song. Works for Good Friday, communion, or any cross-focused service. Congregation engages personally.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led. Intimate verses build to full band chorus. Allow space for personal response. Very powerful in communion settings.

title: Cornerstone
summary_theology: Christ is the Cornerstone, the firm foundation on which all Christian life is built; in Him the believer stands secure against every storm and trial.
practical_worship_leadership: Modern hymn with waltz feel. Very popular and widely known. Works for any season, especially emphasizing foundations.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led. Waltz feel. Build through the song. Contemporary hymn approach. All voices together on chorus.

title: Desert Song
summary_theology: The decision to praise God in the desert seasons of life — when hope seems dry and circumstances are hard — is a profound act of faith that honors God above all circumstances.
practical_worship_leadership: Works especially in difficult congregational seasons or for those walking through personal desert times.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led, building. Emotional arc through song. Bridge is a declaration over the desert. Full band on final chorus.

title: Found in You
summary_theology: The believer finds their true self and ultimate completion in Christ alone; hidden in Him, all of life has meaning and security that the world cannot give or take away.
practical_worship_leadership: Identity-building, theologically grounding. Good for identity-focused series or general devotional worship.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven, full band. Build through song. Chorus is strong and singable. Bridge adds emotional depth.

title: Refiner
summary_theology: The prayer for God to refine the believer like silver in the fire, burning away what is not of Him and bringing forth the pure gold of Christlike character.
practical_worship_leadership: Deep sanctification song. Works for prayer and surrender moments or during sanctification-focused seasons.
arrangement_tips: Sparse piano and pads. Very intimate. Allow lots of space. Do not rush the refining imagery to land.

title: Holy Spirit (You Are Welcome Here)
summary_theology: An invitation to the Holy Spirit to come and fill the gathered assembly; surrender and welcome create the atmosphere for the Spirit to move in power.
practical_worship_leadership: One of the most widely used Holy Spirit invitation songs. Works for any service. Creates openness and expectation.
arrangement_tips: Piano and guitar. Gentle, inviting. Build slowly. Allow long spaces for the Spirit to move. Do not rush.

title: Overwhelmed
summary_theology: Being overwhelmed and undone by the greatness of God — His love, beauty, and kindness are so vast that the only response is breathless worship.
practical_worship_leadership: Very accessible, widely known. Works for adoration-focused services. Congregation connects with the emotional declaration.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led, building. Full band on chorus. Allow the crescendo to peak at the right moment. Long outro for response.

title: Your Love Never Fails
summary_theology: God's love is unfailing, unchanging, and completely reliable; no circumstance of life, no depth of failure, can cause His covenant love to waver.
practical_worship_leadership: Reassuring, faith-building. Works in any season. Very widely known. Congregation enters personal worship naturally.
arrangement_tips: Piano and guitar, warm sound. Build through verses. Chorus is the anchor declaration. Works acoustic or full band.

title: No Longer Slaves
summary_theology: The believer is no longer a slave to fear but a child of God; the perfect love of the Father casts out all fear and establishes the identity of adopted son or daughter.
practical_worship_leadership: Deeply impactful. Works for identity, freedom, or adoption-themed services. Congregation engages with personal declaration.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led. Build through song. Long, powerful bridge. Allow congregation to declare their freedom personally.

title: Forever
summary_theology: The steadfast love of God endures forever; from generation to generation His faithfulness stands, and His praise will be sung for all eternity.
practical_worship_leadership: Classic Chris Tomlin anthem. Works as a high-energy opener or response song. Very well known, maximum participation.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven, full band. High BPM, march feel. Congregation sings the Give Thanks refrain naturally. Great for outdoor services.

title: I Will Follow
summary_theology: The simple but profound commitment of discipleship: wherever Jesus leads, the believer follows, taking up the cross daily in full surrender.
practical_worship_leadership: Great for discipleship or mission Sunday. Works for altar calls or commitment responses. Congregation sings with conviction.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven, energetic. Build through verses. Chorus is declaration of commitment. Works well at end of service.

title: Before the Throne of God Above
summary_theology: The believer stands before the throne clothed in the righteousness of Christ who intercedes for them; the accusation of conscience is silenced by the perfect Advocate.
practical_worship_leadership: Theologically profound. Works for any communion, assurance-focused, or conviction/grace service. Very beloved.
arrangement_tips: Piano or guitar, contemporary hymn approach. Multiple modern arrangements available. Do all verses for full theological arc.

title: Through It All
summary_theology: The trials and sorrows of life become teachers of trust; through suffering, the believer learns to depend on God and gains a faith that cannot be shaken.
practical_worship_leadership: Classic for perseverance or suffering-focused services. Congregation of all traditions knows it. Deeply relatable.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led gospel. Gentle, reflective. Build gently through the verses. Choir optional on chorus.

title: The Blood Will Never Lose Its Power
summary_theology: The atoning blood of Jesus does not diminish in power over time; it cleanses, redeems, and overcomes sin now and forever.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for communion, Good Friday, or healing services. Deep conviction in this gospel standard. Congregation sings with conviction.
arrangement_tips: Gospel piano, reverent. Can be done a cappella or with simple accompaniment. Choir adds richness.

title: Tell the World
summary_theology: The church's mandate is to tell the world what God has done; personal testimony and public proclamation are both expressions of the Great Commission.
practical_worship_leadership: Mission-focused, energetic. Works for evangelism emphasis or any outward-facing service.
arrangement_tips: Contemporary gospel. Full band. Choir adds power. Congregation joins on chorus.

title: Alabaster Box
summary_theology: The extravagant offering of the woman with the alabaster box mirrors the posture of any believer who pours out their most precious gift before Jesus in whole-hearted worship.
practical_worship_leadership: Deeply moving, excellent for altar calls or moments of full surrender. CeCe's delivery is iconic. Personal response expected.
arrangement_tips: Piano ballad. Very slow build. Allow long silence at the beginning. Full band enters gently. Extended bridge.

title: Every Praise
summary_theology: Every single blessing, every answer to prayer, every undeserved mercy calls for praise directed to God alone who is the source of every good thing.
practical_worship_leadership: Very simple and powerful. Widely known in Black church tradition. Easy to teach. Works for high-energy praise moments.
arrangement_tips: Simple gospel piano and choir. Repetitive chorus is the point. Congregation builds energy through repetition.

title: If He Did It Before
summary_theology: What God has done before is evidence He will do again; rehearsing the past acts of God is the foundation of present faith for impossible situations.
practical_worship_leadership: Testimony-building, faith-raising. Works for perseverance-focused services or before corporate prayer.
arrangement_tips: High-energy gospel. Full choir and band. The call to rehearse what God has done drives congregational participation.

title: Looking for You
summary_theology: The earnest seeking of God with a whole heart; the believer who longs for God finds that He who promised to be found is already drawing them to Himself.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for prayer emphasis or any seeking-God focus. Congregation resonates with the yearning for God.
arrangement_tips: Contemporary gospel. Piano and full band. Build from yearning verse to hopeful chorus. Choir adds depth.

title: Thank You
summary_theology: The deepest gratitude expressed when looking back at what God has brought the believer through; thanksgiving for grace that was sufficient in every difficulty.
practical_worship_leadership: Personal testimony of gratitude. Works for thanksgiving or testimony-focused services. Congregation enters personal reflection.
arrangement_tips: Gospel ballad. Piano-led. Build from quiet to full choir. Allow personal space for gratitude.

title: Let It Be Known
summary_theology: The bold declaration of salvation through Christ alone in a world of competing claims; the church is not ashamed to let it be known that Jesus is Lord.
practical_worship_leadership: Bold, evangelistic declaration. Works for mission Sunday or any outward-facing emphasis.
arrangement_tips: Contemporary gospel-influenced. Full band. Choir optional. Build to powerful declaration on chorus.

title: Give Me Faith
summary_theology: The honest prayer for more faith from one who acknowledges weakness; it is not striving but asking the Giver of faith to increase what He alone can give.
practical_worship_leadership: Vulnerable, honest. Works in faith-crisis seasons or any honest acknowledgment of need for more faith. Good altar song.
arrangement_tips: Piano and guitar. Intimate opening. Build gently. Allow space for honest prayer during the bridge.

title: Beautiful Exchange
summary_theology: The beautiful exchange at the cross: Christ took our sin, shame, and death and gave His righteousness, glory, and life; the most unequal and wonderful transaction ever made.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for communion, Good Friday, or any cross-centered service. Congregation enters the wonder of the exchange.
arrangement_tips: Piano and keys. Reverent, building arrangement. Allow the exchange imagery to be spoken slowly in the bridge.

title: The Wonder of the Cross
summary_theology: Standing before the cross in wonder, the believer sees the scope of what Christ endured and the depth of love that motivated His sacrifice.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for Good Friday or any atonement focus. UK worship sensibility. Congregation is drawn into cross-centered adoration.
arrangement_tips: Piano and guitar. Simple UK contemporary worship feel. Build through verses. Congregation engages deeply.

title: Majesty (Here I Am)
summary_theology: The declaration of God's majesty and the worshiper's surrender before it; the posture of here I am is the fitting response to the overwhelming glory of the King.
practical_worship_leadership: High energy, declaration-focused. Works as a strong opener or service response. Very well known in UK and globally.
arrangement_tips: Rock-driven, full band. Guitar and keys. Congregation sings the here I am declaration strongly.

title: Glorious
summary_theology: The glory of God displayed in creation and supremely in Christ; the proper response to encountering this glory is worship, wonder, and joyful praise.
practical_worship_leadership: Energetic praise anthem. Works as an opener or post-message response. Youth and young adults engage strongly.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven, full band. High energy throughout. Congregation sings declaration chorus with full voice.

title: Everlasting
summary_theology: God who is everlasting deserves the praise of those whom He has made for eternity; His enduring character is the ground of enduring worship.
practical_worship_leadership: Joyful, accessible. Works as an opener or response. Very singable. Congregation picks it up quickly.
arrangement_tips: Full band, energetic. Guitar and keys. Simple arrangement serves the joyful declaration.

title: Your Great Love
summary_theology: The incomprehensible width, length, height, and depth of God's love as described by Paul; meditation on this great love drives the worshiper to adoration.
practical_worship_leadership: Works in any UK-influenced worship context. Reflective and building. Congregation enters personal adoration.
arrangement_tips: Piano and guitar, UK contemporary style. Build through song. Clean production. Bridge builds to full adoration.

title: Build Your Kingdom Here
summary_theology: A prayer and declaration for the kingdom of God to break into the surrounding culture and city; the church is the vehicle for this kingdom advancement.
practical_worship_leadership: Excellent for mission, urban ministry, or kingdom-vision services. High energy and deeply missional. Youth especially respond.
arrangement_tips: Folk-rock, banjo and full band. High energy from the top. Congregation sings declaration with conviction.

title: Great Things
summary_theology: From creation to the cross to the second coming, God has done and is doing great things; the appropriate response is joyful, exuberant praise.
practical_worship_leadership: High energy, very widely known. Works anywhere. Great opener or general praise song. Congregation picks it up easily.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven full band. Very accessible melody. Build through verse to anthemic chorus.

title: Goodness of God (CeCe Winans)
summary_theology: Personal testimony of God's goodness in every season; His mercies have followed the believer all their days and His faithfulness is beyond measure.
practical_worship_leadership: Very widely known in its CeCe Winans gospel arrangement. Works for thanksgiving or testimony-focused services.
arrangement_tips: Gospel piano. CeCe's arrangement has more energy than the original. Full choir option. Allow extended worship.

title: Great Is the Lord
summary_theology: The greatness of God calls for the greatest possible worship from all of His people; His righteous character makes Him worthy of exaltation across the nations.
practical_worship_leadership: Classic CCM worship anthem. Works everywhere. Congregation sings with full voice from the first line.
arrangement_tips: Piano and keys, full band. March feel. Congregation knows it deeply. Works for any occasion.

title: Flawless
summary_theology: In Christ, the believer is declared flawless before God; not because of personal righteousness but because of Christ's perfect righteousness imputed to them.
practical_worship_leadership: Very accessible identity declaration. Works for grace-centered, identity, or freedom services. Youth especially respond.
arrangement_tips: Contemporary rock feel. Guitar-driven. Congregation sings the flawless declaration with personal ownership.

title: Move (Keep Walkin)
summary_theology: The encouragement to keep moving forward in faith despite weariness; pressing toward the goal of knowing Christ and walking in His calling.
practical_worship_leadership: Upbeat, encouraging. Works for new season services, perseverance emphasis, or any moment of needing encouragement.
arrangement_tips: Contemporary rock, high energy. Guitar-driven. Congregation sings with encouraging declaration. Strong bridge.

title: Here for You
summary_theology: The declaration that the believer's existence is for the glory of God; everything done in worship and life is an offering of living worship.
practical_worship_leadership: Works as an opener or mission emphasis. Very energetic and declarative. Congregation enters the vision of living for God's glory.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven, full band. March feel. Strong rhythmic verse. Big chorus. Works for large events and gatherings.

title: Less Like Me
summary_theology: The prayer for daily growth in Christlikeness, wanting more of Christ's grace, compassion, and love for others and less of self-centered tendencies.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for any sanctification or discipleship focus. Vulnerable and accessible. Congregation resonates with the honest prayer.
arrangement_tips: Acoustic feel, Southern rock gentle. Simple arrangement fits the honest prayer quality. Build through song.

title: Mended
summary_theology: The good news that God takes the broken, shame-filled person and makes them whole in Christ; nothing is beyond the mending power of the Redeemer.
practical_worship_leadership: Healing and redemption focus. Works for people carrying shame or broken places. Strong message of hope and wholeness.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led, emotional. Build from intimate to full band. Story-driven lyric needs space to breathe.

title: Best News Ever
summary_theology: The gospel is the best news the world has ever heard; this joy-filled declaration drives the church to celebrate and share what has been freely given to them.
practical_worship_leadership: Upbeat, accessible. Great for evangelism emphasis or any celebration of the gospel. Works across all ages.
arrangement_tips: Contemporary pop-CCM. Energetic, fun. Guitar and keys. Congregation sings joyfully from first chorus.

title: Lord of Lords
summary_theology: The ultimate sovereignty of Christ as Lord of lords; all earthly authority is derivative and temporal while His reign is eternal and absolute.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for any sovereignty or lordship emphasis. Congregation engages with the majesty of the declaration.
arrangement_tips: Piano and full band. Stately, powerful. Build through song. Congregation engages with the majestic declaration.

title: Take All of Me
summary_theology: The prayer of total surrender: not a reserved or partial offering but the whole person, all ambitions, all future, laid at the feet of the One who is worthy.
practical_worship_leadership: Altar moment. Works for consecration, ordination, or any full-surrender emphasis. Deep response common.
arrangement_tips: Piano and pads. Very intimate opening. Build gently. Allow long space at bridge for personal surrender.

title: King of My Heart
summary_theology: The declaration that God is good and trustworthy as the personal King; surrendering the inner rule of the heart to the One who is worthy of it.
practical_worship_leadership: Deeply moving. Works for surrender services, counseling contexts, or any theme of trusting God as King.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led, spacious. Very emotive arrangement. Bridge is the most powerful part. Allow long response time.

title: Way Maker (Leeland arrangement)
summary_theology: God is the Way Maker who breaks through impossible situations; His light-in-darkness and promise-keeping character makes Him the only true hope.
practical_worship_leadership: Leeland arrangement of Way Maker with distinct acoustic feel. Works in acoustic or contemporary contexts.
arrangement_tips: Acoustic guitar and piano. More stripped back than the original. Works in smaller settings or acoustic service formats.

title: Revelation
summary_theology: The earnest cry of the created for the Creator to reveal Himself; the soul that has tasted God longs for more revelation of His face and presence.
practical_worship_leadership: Southern rock worship ballad. Very accessible and emotional. Works in any context. Congregation enters easily.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven, Southern rock feel. Mac Powell vocal style defines this song. Full band with controlled dynamics.

title: Talking About a Good Thing
summary_theology: The believer is talking about the best thing they have ever found — the saving grace of Jesus; testimony and witness flow naturally from those who have been transformed.
practical_worship_leadership: Very upbeat, accessible. Works for evangelism emphasis or joyful celebration. Congregation picks it up quickly.
arrangement_tips: High energy, full band. Guitar-driven. Fun, joyful feel. Works as opener or post-sermon celebration.

title: May the Peoples Praise You
summary_theology: The missional heart of the Psalms: that God would bless His people so the nations would know Him and all peoples would come to praise the one true God.
practical_worship_leadership: Excellent for missions, global emphasis, or multi-cultural services. Works also as a general praise anthem.
arrangement_tips: Folk-influenced, full band. March energy. Congregation sings declaration with missional conviction. Very accessible.

title: Speak, O Lord
summary_theology: The prayer for God to speak through His word with life-transforming power; His voice alone can shape the heart, remove the fear, and send out the equipped servant.
practical_worship_leadership: Excellent before a sermon or for any service emphasizing Scripture. Creates expectation for the word to do its work.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led. Simple, reverent. Works a cappella or with minimal accompaniment. Congregation prays as they sing.

title: Come, People of the Risen King
summary_theology: The risen King calls His people from every tribe and tongue to come and rejoice; the resurrection is the foundation of the church's joyful gathering for worship.
practical_worship_leadership: Excellent Easter or Resurrection Sunday opener. Also works for general call to worship. Congregation responds with joy.
arrangement_tips: Irish folk feel, full band. March energy. Very accessible. Works with clapping and movement. Great for processionals.

title: Jesus Saves
summary_theology: The most basic proclamation of Christian faith: Jesus saves; this simple declaration contains the fullness of the gospel and calls for joyful proclamation.
practical_worship_leadership: Classic powerful anthem. Works for evangelistic services, baptism Sundays, or any celebration of salvation.
arrangement_tips: Full band, choir anthem feel. Build to powerful chorus. Congregation declares with conviction. Optional key change.

title: We Fall Down
summary_theology: Joining the elders who fall before the throne, casting their crowns before the worthy One; the posture of the believer is perpetual humble worship before the King.
practical_worship_leadership: Classic intimate worship song. Works at any point in service. Congregation enters a posture of humility naturally.
arrangement_tips: Simple piano or guitar. Very short and beautiful. The holy refrain naturally invites extended repetition.

title: Holy Is the Lord
summary_theology: The earth is filled with God's glory and His holiness; the gathered congregation joins the seraphic declaration from the heavenly vision of Isaiah.
practical_worship_leadership: High-energy, widely known. Works as an opener or any time the focus is on God's holiness. Congregation sings fully.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven, full band. High energy. Very accessible. Works in any context. Building chorus builds momentum.

title: Taste and See
summary_theology: The invitation to experiential knowledge of God's goodness; the believer is called not just to intellectual knowledge but to personal taste and encounter.
practical_worship_leadership: Accessible invitation song. Works for any service. Very simple and inviting. Congregation engages with the personal experience dimension.
arrangement_tips: Simple piano or guitar. Warm, inviting feel. Works for all ages. Very accessible melody.

title: You Are Worthy of My Praise
summary_theology: The all-encompassing declaration that God alone is worthy of the full devotion of mind, heart, soul, and strength; worship is total personal commitment.
practical_worship_leadership: Classic Vineyard worship anthem. Known across traditions. Works as an opener or any celebration moment.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven, full band. Very accessible. The I will do declaration is powerful congregationally. Build to full.

title: This I Know
summary_theology: The certain knowledge that God is for the believer and His love cannot be broken; this assurance grounds the believer in every season of life.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for anxiety-prone seasons or any grounding-in-God-s-love focus. Congregation sings with personal conviction.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led, clean production. Build through song. Allow space for personal application of the declaration.

title: Open Up the Heavens
summary_theology: The prayer for God to rend the heavens and come down; the cry for divine presence to break into the church and community in sovereign revival.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for revival or prayer emphasis. High energy and anticipation. Good for extended worship sets.
arrangement_tips: Full band, building. Guitar and keys. Repeat declarations build expectation. Extended bridge for prayer.

title: With Everything
summary_theology: Wholehearted worship expressed in every aspect of life; the believer's whole existence becomes an offering of praise to the God who deserves everything.
practical_worship_leadership: High-energy anthem. Works for any celebration or vision-casting service. Congregation sings with full conviction.
arrangement_tips: Full band, very high energy. Guitar and keys. Repeat with increasing intensity. Strong ending.

title: Let the Rain Come Down
summary_theology: The prayer for the latter rain of the Spirit to fall afresh; as the natural rain brings harvest, the Spirit's outpouring brings revival and spiritual fruit.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for Holy Spirit emphasis or prayer for revival. Creates atmosphere of expectant openness to God.
arrangement_tips: Piano and guitar. Build gently. Allow space for the rain imagery to create atmosphere. Long outro for prayer.

title: Savior, He Can Move the Mountains
summary_theology: The declaration that the Savior who moves mountains is mighty to save everyone; His power over creation is the same power at work in human redemption.
practical_worship_leadership: Classic Hillsong anthem. Widely known. Works anywhere. The Savior He can move mountains line is deeply congregational.
arrangement_tips: Piano and full band. Build through song. Very accessible, congregation sings immediately. Works for any service.

title: Hosanna (Praise Is Rising)
summary_theology: Hosanna is both praise and cry for salvation; as hearts turn toward the King, hope and joy rise in the gathering, renewing the community of worship.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for Palm Sunday or general praise. Accessible and joyful. Congregation picks it up immediately.
arrangement_tips: Full band. Joyful feel. Build through verse to chorus. Can do key change for final chorus. Very accessible.

title: Evermore
summary_theology: The praise of God that will never cease; what begins in time will extend into eternity as the redeemed join the eternal chorus around the throne.
practical_worship_leadership: Very high energy. Works for any celebration service. Rend Collective folk-rock energy is infectious.
arrangement_tips: Banjo and full folk-rock band. High BPM. Clapping from start. Congregation enters joyfully. Works for outdoor services.

title: Faithful One
summary_theology: God's faithfulness is the rock on which the believer stands; He does not change or fail, and His constancy is the source of all confidence and trust.
practical_worship_leadership: Classic intimate worship song. Works for perseverance-focused services or any trust emphasis. Very accessible.
arrangement_tips: Simple piano or guitar. Vineyard feel. Do not over-produce. The intimacy of the declaration is the point.

title: I Belong to You
summary_theology: The deep security of belonging to God; the believer is His and He is theirs, and no force in creation can break this covenant belonging.
practical_worship_leadership: Intimate, identity-affirming. Works for any context. Simple declaration of belonging resonates across all ages.
arrangement_tips: Piano and pads. Very gentle build. Spacious, intimate production. Allow congregation to enter personal belonging.

title: Sons and Daughters
summary_theology: The glorious truth that believers are not servants but sons and daughters of God; the Spirit of adoption cries Abba Father and establishes their family identity.
practical_worship_leadership: Identity-building, high energy. Works for identity-focused series or any family-of-God celebration.
arrangement_tips: Full band, energetic. Guitar and keys. Build to anthem. Congregation sings declaration of identity strongly.

title: New Wine
summary_theology: The prayer to be made new wine through the breaking and crushing process; God's transforming work requires surrender to the seasons of pressing.
practical_worship_leadership: Powerful for sanctification or refining seasons. Works for surrender altars. Congregation enters personal yielding.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led. Slow, unhurried. Build through the song. Long bridge for personal surrender.

title: Champion
summary_theology: Christ is the Champion who has overcome sin, death, and the devil; the believer stands in His victory and joins the chorus of triumph over every fallen foe.
practical_worship_leadership: Very high energy. Works for Easter, breakthrough, or victory services. Congregation responds with full energy.
arrangement_tips: Full band, high BPM. Guitar and keys. Epic feel. Repeat for extended triumph celebration.

title: Joyful
summary_theology: Joy flows from knowing God and being known by Him; this celebration of His goodness is an act of worship that lifts the spirit and glorifies God.
practical_worship_leadership: Very joyful, accessible. Works for celebration services or any time the congregation needs joy lifted. R&B gospel feel.
arrangement_tips: R&B gospel influenced. Groove-driven. Piano and keys. Fun and celebratory energy throughout.

title: Hymn of the Ages
summary_theology: The worship that has echoed through all the ages of the church joins the present congregation; believers are part of an eternal choir that spans time and eternity.
practical_worship_leadership: Historically grounding and inspiring. Works for any occasion. Connects the present congregation to the great cloud of witnesses.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led, building. Four-part harmony works well. Build to anthem. Strong ending.

title: Amen
summary_theology: Amen is the congregation's great yes to all of God's promises; it is agreement with His word and His will, sealing every prayer and declaration.
practical_worship_leadership: Works well as a service response or declaration song. Bilingual Spanish-English option available. Very accessible.
arrangement_tips: Contemporary, guitar and piano. Works in Spanish, English, or bilingual. Build through song. Joyful feel.

title: Yet I Will Praise
summary_theology: The Habakkuk declaration of faith: though everything fails and is stripped away, yet will I praise the Lord; faith that praises in emptiness is the highest act of trust.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for crisis or loss contexts. The yet will I praise declaration is profoundly empowering. Very moving.
arrangement_tips: Piano-led, building. Emotional arc from desolation to declaration. Full band on the praise declaration.

title: Stand in Your Love
summary_theology: Standing in the love of God casts out every fear; when love is the ground the believer stands on, nothing can overcome or overwhelm the one who is held.
practical_worship_leadership: High energy, freedom declaration. Works for any service on identity, freedom, or overcoming fear. Congregation sings strongly.
arrangement_tips: Guitar-driven, full band. Very energetic. Build through song. Repeat declarations for extended worship.

title: Your Name
summary_theology: The name of Jesus is hope for the hopeless, healing for the broken, and authority over every spiritual power; it is the most powerful name ever spoken.
practical_worship_leadership: Works for healing services or any emphasis on the authority and power of the name of Jesus. Very accessible and singable.
arrangement_tips: Full band, energetic. Guitar and keys. Build through song. Chorus is the proclamation.

title: God I Look to You
summary_theology: Fixing the eyes and heart on God alone in every moment; the believer who looks to God finds their help, strength, and direction entirely in Him.
practical_worship_leadership: Intimate, prayer-like. Works for morning services, prayer emphasis, or any moment of refocusing on God.
arrangement_tips: Piano or guitar, very simple. Unhurried. The looking-to-God quality needs space and stillness. Congregation enters quietly.

title: Joy to the World (Unspeakable Joy)
summary_theology: The ancient proclamation that the Lord has come to bring joy to every corner of the earth; Isaac Watts's paraphrase of Psalm 98 now updated for contemporary celebration.
practical_worship_leadership: High-energy Christmas anthem. Chris Tomlin arrangement is widely known. Works for any Christmas celebration service.
arrangement_tips: Full band, very energetic Christmas feel. Guitar-driven. Congregation knows it immediately. Key change optional.

title: In the Secret
summary_theology: The desire for private, hidden communion with God in the secret place; the believer longs not for public recognition but for personal encounter with the Father.
practical_worship_leadership: Classic Vineyard intimate worship. Works for prayer emphasis or quiet services. Congregation enters contemplative mode.
arrangement_tips: Simple piano or guitar. Very gentle and unhurried. Works well a cappella. Vineyard simplicity is the point.
